question: Only government workers are allowed to vote.
Voting starts early in the morning.
You can vote by sending a letter to the office.
Candidates use posters to tell people about themselves.
The voting machine makes a beep sound after you vote.
You can wear a party t-shirt inside the voting booth.
There is a limit on how much money a candidate can spend.
The capital of India is New Delhi.
The President of India is elected directly by the people.
Voter ID cards have a photo of the voter.
